message:
beads sync: register frankenpandas-9t5qk (fd90.178 add Time-Series Operations integration test)

Single new bead added in the agent flushed JSONL state:

frankenpandas-9t5qk — fd90.178: add Time-Series Operations integration test
  (at_time + dt accessor + tz)
  type: test, priority: 1, status: in_progress (already claimed)
  scope: cover the README "Time-Series Operations" example
    (lines 1254-1276) with a single integration test exercising
    df.at_time / df.between_time, series.dt() accessor methods
    (year/month/day/hour/minute/second/dayofweek/dayofyear/quarter/
    weekofyear/is_month_start/end/is_quarter_start/end/strftime),
    plus dt().tz_localize / tz_convert. Pure additive test —
    fix is "add readme_time_series_operations_compiles_and_runs".

br sync --flush-only style commit; no other beads touched.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
